parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { device_id: $json.device_id, temperature: $json.temperature, voltage: $json.voltage, current: $json.current, gyro_x: $json.gyro_x, gyro_y: $json.gyro_y, gyro_z: $json.gyro_z, is_anomaly: $json.is_anomaly, anomaly_reason: $json.anomaly_reason, severity: $json.severity ?? ($json.is_anomaly ? 'warning' : null), confidence: $json.confidence ?? null } }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ ok: true, is_anomaly: $('Validate & Detect Anomaly').item.json.is_anomaly }) }}
